name: solana-common-errors
description: Diagnose and fix common Solana development errors — GLIBC mismatches, Anchor version conflicts, cargo build-sbf / platform-tools failures, LiteSVM issues, edition2024 crate pins, RPC airdrops, and Anchor 0.29→0.32 migrations. Use when builds fail, Anchor CLI won't install, or CI breaks on Debian/Ubuntu.
